hooks.command: jq '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: ("Edited: " + (.tool_input.file_path // "a file") + ". Review README.md and check if it needs updating to reflect this change.")}}'

bash -c '[ -d test/native/build ] || cmake -S test/native -B test/native/build 2>&1; cmake --build test/native/build 2>&1 && ./test/native/build/tests 2>&1' | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PostToolUse", additionalContext: ("Test results after edit:\n" + .)}}'
